title: Shinjis earphones in Evangelion 30 What model I have a guess

wikitext: []: Shinji's earphones in Evangelion 3.0 - What model? I have a guess             Quote Post by juaxoo » Sat Jan 30, 2016 1:38 am Hi there, Sorry if this topic has been discussed already, but I couldn't find it anywhere. I was just wondering if anybody thought about the earphones/IEMs Shinji uses in the promotional poster for the 3.0 movie. That looks like a Sennheiser MX 471 or MX 581 to me, what do you guys think? I mean I'm not entirely sure but it's the closest one I could think of off the top of my head.
